hero.title: Awakening Church Riga
hero.subtitle: We are a Baptist church. We believe in Jesus Christ and strive to live by the Bible. If you are looking for a church or just want to come and get acquainted, you are welcome.
hero.inviteMain: Join us for the next service.
hero.inviteSub: Free entry. Come yourself and invite friends.

firstVisit.title: New here?
firstVisit.text: We understand that a first visit brings questions: who Baptists are, what we believe, and which ministries may be helpful for you and your children. We will do our best to answer these and other important questions.

cards.title: Church is family
cards.text: If you have not yet found a church that can become your spiritual family, we will gladly welcome you.

cards.title: Care for children and teens
cards.text: We give special attention to children and teenagers: Sunday school is Bible-based, and ministry takes place in a safe and attentive environment.

cards.title: Every person matters
cards.text: Our church has ministries for different ages and life situations: men's, women's, youth, teen groups, small groups, and other areas of support.

visitFlow.title: Your first visit: simple and clear
visitFlow.text: We try to make your first visit easy and understandable. Here is what usually happens.

steps.title: Warm welcome at the entrance
steps.text: It is best to arrive 10-15 minutes early. We will greet you and help you find a seat.

steps.title: Singing, prayer, sermon
steps.text: A typical service includes worship singing, prayer, and a Bible-based sermon.

steps.title: Fellowship after service
steps.text: After the service you can meet people, ask the questions you are interested in, and request prayer.

verse.text: "Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that proceeds from the mouth of God."

about.title: What we believe and how we live
about.subtitle: This is our mission and values as a church: from personal faith in God to a mature life of faith and service.

roadmap.title: Personal encounter with God
roadmap.description: We believe faith does not come by tradition but begins with personal repentance and trust in Christ.

roadmap.title: Grounded in the Word
roadmap.description: The Bible is the highest authority for our faith and church life.

roadmap.title: Church as spiritual family
roadmap.description: We live in fellowship, prayer, and mutual responsibility before God and one another.

roadmap.title: Transforming faith
roadmap.description: The Gospel changes character, relationships, and daily life.

roadmap.title: Calling to serve
roadmap.description: Every believer is called to serve with the gifts God has given.

roadmap.title: Mission in the world
roadmap.description: Our mission is to share the Gospel and be Christ's light in society.

media.title: Media and resources
media.subtitle: Here you can find church livestreams, playlists, and teaching materials.
media.introNote: Video archive, documents, and study resources in one place.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: If you have questions, prayer needs, or plan your first visit, contact us in any convenient way.
weeklySchedule: 2nd Sunday of the month, after service
contact.scheduleNote: During summer, some youth events may be moved.
helpItems: If you cannot reach us right away, leave an email and we will contact you soon.
After service, you can personally talk to church ministers and ask about prayer and visiting.
There are people ready to help new guests get oriented and connected.

helpVerse.text: "Cast all your anxiety on Him because He cares for you."

donate.title: Donations
donate.subtitle: You can support the ministry by bank transfer to the church account.
donate.supportText: Any donation helps support church ministries, teaching, livestreams, and care for people.
donate.checkText: Please carefully verify the details before making a transfer.
donate.verse: "For we are His workmanship, created in Christ Jesus for good works."
details: RIGAS ILGUCIEMA ATMODAS KRIEVU BAPTISTU DRAUDZE
